response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but his resume lacks direct C++ development on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income systems. While he has strong C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is not in the required domain or platform. His recent work is heavily focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, with no clear SQL Server/Oracle experience or financial domain expertise.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (including low-level and embedded systems)
Proven ability to work in fast-paced, high-performance environments (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic)
Demonstrated adaptability across multiple stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit C++ development on Windows in the last 5+ years
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
No evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or Summit platform familiarity
